success_criteria.criterion: Observable immutable drift blocks (no removal, no recreation)
success_criteria.verify: pre-create security-advisor with wrong immutable responseMode; /supervise returns BLOCKED, unchanged existing actor, no other actors created

success_criteria.criterion: Stopped actor blocks (no same-name create, no deletion)

success_criteria.criterion: Supervisor instructions contain no self-stop directive
success_criteria.verify: rg -n "Goal verified complete" .pi/prompts/supervise.md returns no matches in supervisor block; never self-stop is instruction policy + stopped-state detection (bounded, not host enforcement)

success_criteria.criterion: Mutable drift repaired in place, IDs preserved
success_criteria.verify: fault-inject via supported provider setters (instructions/events/tools/delivery); rerun /supervise; same IDs with canonical fields restored

success_criteria.criterion: Mid-reconcile failure returns BLOCKED with action trace + post-read
success_criteria.verify: temporarily make a fresh actor's instructions empty; expect one success, one caught error, no third mutation, BLOCKED, post-read trace; restore and rerun
